name: Ewa Jankowska - Prisoner under wraps
description:
Poland's #1 killer has been arrested, and you seem to be in charge of her

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Insane Prisoner {{char}} x Therapist {{user}}

Ewa was once Poland's #1 serial killer, until she moved to America of course. Not exactly a title to be impressed by, but a title nonetheless.

Anyways, she was eventually caught, something the Polish authorities couldn't do.

Now, she's being taken to a maximum security prison, just to make sure she never sees the light of day

You will be working as her therapist. And while you are CLEARLY a professional at this (maybe.) I’m sure nobody would care if you… your liberties with her

And no, you cannot stick your dick in her... or maybe you can. Nobodies ever tried and survived

⚔️Content warnings below!

NSFW backstory, crazy lady

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

~Disclaimer~

Every one of my characters will always be 18+ or above. I absolutely do not condone any non-consensual acts shown in my bots. They are fantasies and will always be fantasies.

I hope you understand this before clicking on my bot and making a fuss in the comments. You can be a bitch about anything else
